title: I made a Notion habit tracker with streak counter and weekly completion rate [template, 7€]
body:
Been tracking habits in Notion for a while but my setup was messy. Built this template properly with:

- Daily log database (one entry per habit per day)
- Streak counter via Notion formula — shows consecutive days automatically
- Weekly completion rate (% of goal met per habit this week)
- Monthly calendar view
- Category system (Health, Mind, Work, Social)

Works on the free Notion plan. EN/DE both included.

It's paid (7€ one-time) — just a small template but I put some thought into the formula setup so you don't have to.

Happy to answer questions about how the streak formula works.

→ https://tinycraft.gumroad.com/l/yxvmey

title: Notion Habit Tracker Template — Streaks & Monthly Overview
description: Track your habits in Notion with automatic streak counting. Daily check-ins, weekly completion rate, monthly calendar. One-time 7€ — no subscription, no app, your data stays yours. #notiontemplate #habittracker #productivity #notionsetup

title: My Notion habit tracker setup — how I built streaks that actually stick
description: Using this Notion template to track 5 habits daily. Streak formula, weekly rate, monthly view. Available as a template. #notion #habits #habittracker #selfimprovement
